zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord Richard "Cementorius" Mason of Chillwell於大約1320年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾阿爾維勒時，他的父親John Le Mason19歲，母親Christine Decharnes17歲。他於1349年與Basile Eve Culting在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾諾廷加姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1390年在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾爾維爾享年72歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾爾維爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord Richard "Cementorius" Mason of Chillwell于大约1320年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾阿爾維勒时，他的父亲John Le Mason19岁，母亲Christine Decharnes17岁。他于1349年与Basile Eve Culting在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾諾廷加姆结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1390年在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾爾維爾享年72岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾爾維爾。

nameMeanings.name: Mason
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English masoun ‘mason, stone worker, builder in stone’ (Old Central French maçon, masson). A Middle English form machun (derived from Old French machun) gives rise to Machin and its variants. See also Mayson . Stonemasonry was a hugely important craft in the Middle Ages.
Italian (Veneto): variant of   Masone  .
Altered form of French   Masson  .

variants.name: Masson
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Lucien, Alain, Henri, Pierre, Yves, Agathe, Aime, Cecile, Clovis, Francois, Francoise.
Scottish: variant of   Mason   ‘mason’.
Scottish: variant of   Meston  .

variants.name: Machin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Juan, Jose, Carlos, Jorge, Mario, Miguel, Pedro, Blanca, Diego, Luis, Ramon.
English: variant of   Machen  . This is the more common form of the name in Britain and Ireland.
Spanish (Machín): probably a nickname from machín ‘boor, lout’, often applied to a blacksmith's apprentice.

variants.name: Macon
meanings: French: habitational name from any of several places so called, e.g. in Saône-et-Loire.
French: from the old oblique form of the ancient Germanic personal name Mako, a variant of Mago, a short form of compound names formed with maht ‘strength, power’ as the first element.
French (Maçon): occupational name for a mason, (Old) French maçon.

variants.name: Machen
meanings: English: variant of Mason , from the Middle English form machun (derived from Old French machun).

variants.name: Meason
meanings: English: variant of   Mason  .

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyong, Kyong Suk, Young, Chae, Chi Young, Hang, Kil, Rin, Sang Hun, Chang, Chong, Insoo, Kum, Sun Young, Yom, Young Hwan.  Cambodian Kiwan, Oeurn, Phoeun, Pich, Saroeuth, Seung, Sophath, Sophea, Yoeun, Phan, Son.  Indian Shanti, Harendra.
Indian (Uttar Pradesh): Brahmin name, from Sanskrit om, the Hindu sacred and mystic syllable uttered at the beginning of prayers.
Cambodian: written ឱម, corresponding to the exclamation of solemn affirmation, of Sanskrit origin (see 1 above), chanted by Buddhist monks.

variants.name: Oum
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Heang, Hye, Kam, Kan, Kheng, Khin, Kun, Sang, Sok, Phong, Yom, Yoo, Youn, Cuong, Phal, Samnang, Tin.  Cambodian Sokha, Chheang, Choeun, Moeun, Roeun, Sambath, Samoeun, Savuth, Soeun, Sopheap.
Cambodian: written អ៊ុំ, from a Khmer word denoting an elder sibling of one's parent (i.e. ‘uncle’ or ‘aunt’). Compare   Om   3 and   Um   2.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Lord Richard "Cementorius" Mason of Chillwell was born about 1320, in Alveley, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Le Mason, was 19 and his mother, Christine Decharnes, was 17. He married Basile Eve Culting in 1349, in Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died about 1390, in Chilwell, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 72, and was buried in Chilwell, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord Richard "Cementorius" Mason of Chillwell est né environ 1320, à Alveley, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Le Mason, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Christine Decharnes, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Basile Eve Culting en 1349, à Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé environ 1390, à Chilwell, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Chilwell, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord Richard "Cementorius" Mason of Chillwell um 1320 in Alveley, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Le Mason 19 und seine Mutter Christine Decharnes 17. Er hat 1349 in Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Basile Eve Culting geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb um 1390 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Chilwell, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Chilwell, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Richard "Cementorius" Mason of Chillwell è nato il circa 1320 nel Alveley, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Le Mason, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Christine Decharnes, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Basile Eve Culting nel 1349, nel Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì circa 1390, nel Chilwell, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Chilwell, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord Richard "Cementorius" Mason of Chillwellが約1320年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアアルベリーで生まれた時，父John Le Masonは19歳，母Christine Decharnesは17歳であった。1349年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアノッティンガムでBasile Eve Cultingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は約1390年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアチルウエルで72歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアチルウエルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Richard "Cementorius" Mason of Chillwell(이)가 대략 1320년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 앨벨리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Le Mason(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Christine Decharnes(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1349년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 노틴그함에서 Basile Eve Culting(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1390년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 치웰에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 치웰에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Richard "Cementorius" Mason of Chillwell nasceu aproximadamente 1320, em Alveley, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Le Mason, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Christine Decharnes, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Basile Eve Culting em 1349, em Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1390, em Chilwell, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Chilwell, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord Richard "Cementorius" Mason of Chillwell родился около 1320 г. в местности алвели, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Le Mason было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Christine Decharnes, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Basile Eve Culting в 1349 г. в местности ноттингхам, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер около 1390 г. в местности чилвелл, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности чилвелл, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord Richard "Cementorius" Mason of Chillwell nació aproximadamente 1320, en Alveley, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Le Mason, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Christine Decharnes, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Basile Eve Culting en 1349, en Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió aproximadamente 1390, en Chilwell, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Chilwell, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
